translation.en: I am afraid to go into the dark.

notes_md:
**sợ** = to be afraid / scared. It’s the basic word for fear in everyday situations.

It’s a **verb**, so you say what you’re afraid of right after it: *sợ + noun / verb phrase*.  

It can also mean “be worried that…” in softer situations, close to *lo*.  
Opposite idea: **dũng cảm** (brave).

content.sentence: Tôi ___ khi nhìn thấy con rắn.

translation.en: I am afraid when I see the snake.

definitions.vi: cảm thấy sợ hãi hoặc lo lắng; sợ.
definitions.es: sentir miedo o ansiedad; tener miedo.
definitions.en: to feel fear or anxiety; to be afraid.

example.en: I am afraid of the dark.

exampleSentences: Em không sợ nói trước đám đông nữa rồi.
Anh sợ đi máy bay mỗi khi phải công tác xa.
Chị sợ con mèo đen chạy qua đường vào ban đêm.
exampleSentencesTranslated: I am not afraid to speak in front of a crowd anymore.
I am afraid of flying every time I have to travel for work.
I am afraid when a black cat runs across the street at night.
notes:
sợ = to be afraid / scared. It’s the basic word for fear in everyday situations.

It’s a verb, so you say what you’re afraid of right after it: sợ + noun / verb phrase.  

It can also mean “be worried that…” in softer situations, close to lo.  
Opposite idea: dũng cảm (brave).
